summary_one_line: A valid CPAL v1 table whose paletteLabelsZ offset field is non-zero, reached via the CPAL FOURCC-tagged table directory

hypotheses.what_input_feature: The input must carry the literal CPAL FOURCC tag (bytes 43 50 41 4c) in the table directory so the CPAL parser is selected, then a CPALV1Tail with a non-zero paletteLabelsZ offset so the false branch at CPAL.hh:63 is taken.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: The vpc winning seed contains the literal 'CPAL' tag at offsets 0x0c-0x0f and reaches line 64 ([W]), the dereference past the !paletteLabelsZ guard; its ancestor chain has an I2S-floor dash row, so I2SRandReplace substituted the exact CPAL magic.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: value_profile lacks I2SRandReplace, so it never substitutes the exact 4-byte CPAL tag; its blocking seeds carry unrelated bytes (e.g. 47(G)/4f(O)/53(S) at 0x0c-0x0f) and stay on the true branch (T=20 F=0).
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: cmplog's I2SRandReplace reads the post-execution CmpLogObserver buffer and substitutes the exact CPAL FOURCC operand into the input, which the havoc-only value_profile cannot synthesize; this is the I2S delta that distinguishes vpc from value_profile.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: Beyond the CPAL tag, the CPAL v1 header offset/length fields must be tuned so paletteLabelsZ resolves to a non-zero sub-table offset; reaching this multi-field constraint benefits from incremental Hamming/prefix gradient feedback.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: The vpc winner's header bytes (offsets 0x17=1c, 0x19=ff, 0x1b=04, 0x1c=73) are concentrated/structured distinct from losers; vpc's CMP_MAP gradient preserves intermediate inputs whose offset comparisons edge closer to a valid non-zero paletteLabelsZ.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: cmplog has no CMP_MAP gradient feedback, so partially-correct header offsets that do not yet flip a branch are discarded; cmplog blocks 10/10 at the branch (resolved=0/10 blocked=10).
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile's CMP_MAP records (PC, operand-distance bucket); an input whose CPAL offset/length comparison is closer to a non-zero paletteLabelsZ adds a new bucket and is kept as corpus, giving the gradient hill-climb that pure cmplog lacks. This is the value_profile delta distinguishing vpc from cmplog.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker false side requires paletteLabelsZ to be non-zero to avoid the early return.
The winning role reaches line 64 (the dereference) only when the guard is passed; losers never do.
The loser blocking seeds take the true branch 20 times and never the false side.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: d=1   L  63  T=0 F=1  T=20 F=0  if (!paletteLabelsZ) return HB_OT_NAME_ID_INVALID;

evidence_trail.claim: The vpc winning seed carries the literal CPAL FOURCC tag at offsets 0x0c-0x0f.
At offsets 0x0c-0x0f the winner has CPAL bytes while losers concentrate on unrelated bytes.
evidence_trail.cited_section: BYTE DIFF (W vs L at common offsets)

evidence_trail.claim: cmplog's I2SRandReplace substitutes a logged CMP operand at matching offsets in the input.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
scans the input for byte sequences matching one
operand, and substitutes the other operand at those offsets.

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile's CMP_MAP preserves an input whose operand pair is closer to matching as new corpus.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
An input that produces a
CMP-operand pair closer to matching than any previously-seen pair
adds a new CMP_MAP bucket and is preserved as corpus.

evidence_trail.claim: cmplog as a loser blocks all 10 trials at this branch.
vpc instrumentation is the union of cmplog (CMP buffer) and value_profile (CMP_MAP gradient).
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
union of cmplog and value_profile — edge counters,
per-execution CMP buffer (`CmpLogObserver`), and CMP_MAP gradient buckets.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: Ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 6812 --role W --fuzzer value_profile_cmplog --trial 1 --seed 15629def0bf913b0` and observed an I2S-floor dash row (mutation_op = -) at depth 17 of the 18-level ancestor chain, the lower-bound signal of an I2SRandReplace find under the current build.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic CPAL v1 harness where injecting the exact 4-byte CPAL/paletteLabelsZ magic alone (single I2S substitution) lets cmplog resolve the branch as fast as vpc, with no measurable value_profile gradient contribution, would refute the multi-feature joint-necessity claim.

weakest_evidence_point: The value_profile (CMP_MAP gradient) hypothesis rests on inferring a multi-field offset constraint from concentrated header byte-diff offsets (0x17/0x19/0x1b/0x1c) rather than from a directly observed intermediate corpus chain.
